watermarkSettings.randomCoordinatesDesc: Move freely anywhere on screen instead of fixed positions
watermarkSettings.movementPatternDesc: Choose how the watermark travels between positions
watermarkSettings.sizeDesc: Choose the size of the watermark text
watermarkSettings.useCustomPreviewTextDesc: Test with custom text that won't be saved
watermarkSettings.enableVoiceDesc: Play voice announcements at regular intervals

help.title: Help & FAQ
help.stillNeedHelpDescription: Can't find what you're looking for? Contact our support team.

resetPassword.question: How do I reset my password?
resetPassword.answer: Go to Settings > Change Password, enter your current password and create a new one. You can also use the Forgot Password link on the login page.

accessPurchasedCourses.question: How can I access my purchased courses?
accessPurchasedCourses.answer: Go to My Courses page. All purchased or activated courses will appear there automatically.

retakeExam.question: Can I retake an exam if I fail?
retakeExam.answer: This depends on the exam settings. Some exams allow retakes, while others may require instructor permission.

activationCode.question: How do I activate a course with an activation code?
activationCode.answer: Go to the course activation page, enter your activation code, then submit it to unlock the course.

videoPlayerIssue.question: The video player is not working. What should I do?
videoPlayerIssue.answer: Refresh the page, check your internet connection, and try another browser. If the issue continues, contact support.

lectureWatchLimit.question: How many times can I watch a lecture?
lectureWatchLimit.answer: The number of views depends on the lecture settings set by your instructor or center.

changeCenter.question: Can I change my enrolled center?
changeCenter.answer: Please contact support or your current center to request changing your enrolled center.

downloadMaterials.question: How do I download course materials?
downloadMaterials.answer: Open the course lesson and check the attached files section. If downloads are available, you will see a download button.

legal.title: Legal Information
legal.subtitle: Terms of Service and Privacy Policy

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing and using Learnoo Student Portal, you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and provisions of this agreement.

accounts.title: 2. User Accounts
accounts.content: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account and password. You agree to accept responsibility for all activities that occur under your account.

courseAccess.title: 3. Course Access and Content
courseAccess.content: Course content is provided for educational purposes only. Sharing, copying, or distributing course materials without permission is strictly prohibited.

examIntegrity.title: 4. Exam Integrity
examIntegrity.content: All exams and quizzes must be completed honestly and independently. Any form of cheating, plagiarism, or academic dishonesty may result in account suspension.

payments.title: 5. Payment and Refunds
payments.content: All payments are processed through authorized methods. Refund policies may vary by course or center. Please contact support for refund information.

termination.title: 6. Termination
termination.content: We reserve the right to terminate or suspend access to our service immediately, without prior notice, for conduct that violates these Terms of Service.

collect.title: Information We Collect
collect.content: We collect information you provide directly to us, including:
items: Name, email address, and phone number
Quiz, assignment, and academic performance data
Usage data and interaction with the platform

use.title: How We Use Your Information
use.content: We use the information we collect to:
items: Provide, maintain, and improve our services
Process your course enrollments and lesson access
Send you notifications and support messages
Respond to your comments and questions

sharing.title: Information Sharing
sharing.content: We do not share your personal information with third parties except:
items: With authorized teachers or educational centers
To protect our rights and prevent fraud

security.title: Data Security
security.content: We implement appropriate security measures to protect your personal information. However, no method of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.content: You have the right to access, update, or request deletion of your personal information. Contact support to exercise these rights.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us through the platform support channels.
